content: We can reframe human reflexion as a built-in active learning memory system that actively prioritizes, prunes, and retrieves high-impact past experiences to improve future decision-making, just as cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures do for AI agents. This framing suggests that existing advances in optimizing active agent memory could be used to design structured practices that improve human reflexion's efficiency for long-horizon personal and professional learning.
